name: Back Layout
description: Body floats straight, face-up on surface, sculling under hips

name: Front Layout
description: Body floats straight, face-down on surface, sculling by chest

name: Tub
description: Both legs pulled to chest, shins and feet parallel on surface

name: Ballet Leg
description: Back layout with one leg extended perpendicular to body

name: Inverted Tuck
description: Body curled in tuck position while inverted underwater

name: Support Scull
description: Forearms at 90 degrees, moved back and forth to support body

name: Propeller Scull
description: Propels the body headfirst across the surface

name: Eggbeater Kick
description: Alternating circular breaststroke kick for treading and lifting

name: Spin 180
description: Half rotation while in vertical position

name: Double Ballet Leg
description: Both legs extended and held perpendicular to the body

name: Flamingo
description: Ballet leg with bottom leg pulled into chest, shin touching knee

name: Crane
description: Vertical body, one leg vertical, other at 90-degree L shape

name: Back Tuck Somersault
description: From back layout, full 360-degree backward rotation

name: Porpoise
description: Rise to vertical position from a submerged approach

name: Tower
description: Front layout to pike, lift one leg to crane, other to vertical

name: Spin Up 360
description: Full ascending spin, rising while rotating 360 degrees

name: Torpedo Scull
description: Propels body feet-first in a streamlined position

name: Circle
description: All swimmers arranged in a ring, often rotating

name: Straight Line
description: All swimmers in a single row

name: Diagonal Line
description: Swimmers in an angled line across the pool

name: V-Formation
description: Swimmers in a V or chevron shape

name: Diamond
description: Four or more swimmers forming a diamond shape
